title: AlertPayload
description: Published to iiot/v1/alerts/{site}/{line}/{asset}/{alert_id} when an alert is opened, acknowledged, or closed.

v.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

id.description: UUID of the alert row in the alerts table.

ts.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when this alert event was emitted.

site.description: Site identifier matching the ISA-95 topic hierarchy.

signal.description: The sensor signal that triggered the alert.

alert_type.description: Which detection layer fired: threshold rule, statistical z-score, or ML anomaly.

severity.description: Alert severity. Matches the severity enum used in event_payload.schema.json.

value.description: The raw sensor value that triggered the alert.

threshold.description: The threshold that was crossed. Null for statistical and ml alert types.

state.description: Current state of the alert at the time this event was published.

message.description: Human-readable description of the alert condition.

opened_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the alert was first opened. Present on all events.

acked_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the alert was acknowledged. Null if not yet acknowledged.

closed_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the alert was closed. Null if still open.

rule_id.description: UUID of the alert_rules row that triggered this alert. Null for statistical and ml types.
